assembly_instructions: OSE bolt-together modular tractor. A bolted XYZ space frame of 4×4 in square steel tubing — floor pan, two top side rails, four vertical corner posts — forms the chassis. Four large wheels sit at the corners, each driven by its own hub-mounted hydraulic 'universal rotor' motor for independent skid-steer 4WD. A modular PowerCube engine/pump block bolts to the rear-upper of the frame and supplies pressure to every hydraulic consumer. A front loader assembly — two side-by-side arms pivoting on brackets at the forward posts, raised by two hydraulic cylinders — carries a universal quick-attach bucket. A rear universal tool bar accepts three-point implements. The operator sits mid-frame with a tilt-forward steering column under a simple two-post ROPS roll cage.

info.japanese_name: ライフトラック（オープンソース・トラクター）
info.summary: Bolt-together, open-source, four-wheel hydraulic skid-steer tractor. Foundational workhorse of OSE's 50-machine Global Village Construction Set.
info.description: LifeTrac is a modular, open-source tractor developed by Open Source Ecology as the prime mover of its Global Village Construction Set. The entire machine is built from bolted 4×4 in square steel tubing — a 'XYZ space frame' — so individual modules (wheels, PowerCube, loader arm, tool bar) can be swapped in the field without welding. Each of the four wheels is driven independently by a hydraulic universal-rotor hub motor through a planetary gear-down, enabling true skid-steer turning and four-wheel independent traction. Hydraulic power comes from a removable PowerCube engine/pump module mounted on the rear of the chassis; flows are distributed via quick-couplers to the loader-arm cylinders, the drive motors, and any attached implement. The front loader has two parallel arms pivoting at the front posts with two hydraulic cylinders lifting them; the arms terminate at a universal quick-attach plate that carries the bucket. The rear universal tool bar accepts rippers, three-point hitches, augers, and backhoes. All CAD, bill of materials, and build instructions are released under CC BY-SA 4.0.
info.operator: Open Source Ecology and community builders (farms, training sites, maker communities)
info.contractor: Open Source Ecology (Marcin Jakubowski et al.)
info.status: Open-source, production-tested; multiple independent builds in service

facts.label: Configuration
facts.value: Four-wheel hydraulic skid-steer, bolted XYZ space frame

facts.label: Power
facts.value: Removable PowerCube engine/pump module (≈27 hp typical)

facts.label: Front attachment
facts.value: Two-arm loader with two hydraulic cylinders + universal bucket

facts.label: Rear attachment
facts.value: Universal tool bar — ripper, 3-point hitch, backhoe, auger

facts.label: Chassis
facts.value: 4×4 in square steel tubing, bolted (not welded)

parts.name: Chassis Floor Pan
parts.role: Bolted 4×4 in tubing floor pan. Every module above and the wheels below tie into it.

parts.name: Top Rail (Port)
parts.role: Port-side top rail of the XYZ space frame. Connects the four vertical corner posts.

parts.name: Top Rail (Starboard)
parts.role: Starboard-side top rail.

parts.name: Corner Post (Fwd-Left)
parts.role: Forward-left corner post tying the top rail to the floor; carries the loader pivot.

parts.name: Corner Post (Fwd-Right)
parts.role: Forward-right corner post; carries the starboard loader pivot.

parts.name: Corner Post (Rear-Left)
parts.role: Rear-left corner post.

parts.name: Corner Post (Rear-Right)
parts.role: Rear-right corner post.

parts.name: Wheel (Fwd-Left)
parts.role: Front-left wheel on a quick-connect hub.

parts.name: Wheel (Fwd-Right)
parts.role: Front-right wheel.

parts.name: Wheel (Rear-Left)
parts.role: Rear-left wheel.

parts.name: Wheel (Rear-Right)
parts.role: Rear-right wheel.

parts.name: Universal Rotor + Gear-Down (FL)
parts.role: Hydraulic universal-rotor hub motor + planetary gear-down at the front-left wheel. One of four identical drives — true 4WD skid-steer.

parts.name: Universal Rotor + Gear-Down (FR)
parts.role: Front-right hydraulic hub motor.

parts.name: Universal Rotor + Gear-Down (RL)
parts.role: Rear-left hydraulic hub motor.

parts.name: Universal Rotor + Gear-Down (RR)
parts.role: Rear-right hydraulic hub motor.

parts.name: PowerCube (engine + pump)
parts.role: Modular diesel/gas engine + hydraulic pump block bolted to the rear of the frame. Supplies pressure to every hydraulic consumer.

parts.name: PowerCube Exhaust Stack
parts.role: Short vertical exhaust stack on top of the PowerCube.

parts.name: Loader Pivot Bracket (Port)
parts.role: Pivot bracket bolted to the forward-left post — the loader arm hinges here.

parts.name: Loader Pivot Bracket (Stbd)
parts.role: Starboard loader pivot bracket.

parts.name: Loader Arm (Port)
parts.role: Port-side loader arm hinged at the pivot bracket; raised 30° in the reference pose.

parts.name: Loader Arm (Stbd)
parts.role: Starboard-side loader arm.

parts.name: Loader Hydraulic Cylinder (Port)
parts.role: Port-side hydraulic lift cylinder — raises and lowers the arm.

parts.name: Loader Hydraulic Cylinder (Stbd)
parts.role: Starboard-side hydraulic lift cylinder.

parts.name: Universal Front Bucket
parts.role: Standard quick-attach front bucket for earth, gravel, and material handling.

parts.name: Universal Rear Tool Bar
parts.role: Rear tool bar — accepts ripper, 3-point hitch, backhoe, auger, and other standard implements.

parts.name: Operator Seat
parts.role: Central operator seat.

parts.name: Steering / Joystick Column
parts.role: Forward-tilted control column carrying the skid-steer joysticks and throttle.

parts.name: ROPS Post (Port)
parts.role: Port-side roll-over protective-structure post.

parts.name: ROPS Post (Starboard)
parts.role: Starboard-side ROPS post.

parts.name: ROPS Top Bar
parts.role: Cross bar joining the two ROPS posts across the top.
